supplements.name: Tadalafil 2.5mg
supplements.notes: Anderson 2016 obs HR 0.67. Endothelial RCTs.

supplements.name: Finasteride 1.25mg
supplements.notes: PCPT RCT n=18882. Hair preservation.

supplements.name: Creatine 5g
supplements.notes: Muscle/cognitive RCTs. No mortality.

supplements.name: Metformin 500mg
supplements.notes: Bannister 2014: diabetics on metformin outlived controls. TAME pending.

supplements.name: Cocoa flavanols ~500mg
supplements.notes: COSMOS RCT HR 0.73 CVD. Blueprint Cocoa priced at $41/container with 60 scoops x 5.76g; at ~6g/day this is ~58 days/container, or ~$260/yr.
supplements.dose_notes: 1 scoop (5.76g) blended into nutty pudding premix

supplements.name: Magnesium 400mg
supplements.notes: Current dose is 400mg supplemental magnesium. Benefit is capped for diminishing returns; watch GI tolerance because the NIH supplemental UL is 350mg/day.

supplements.name: Omega-3 CLO ~500mg
supplements.notes: Aung 2018 meta. VITAL.
supplements.db_product: Nordic Naturals Arctic Cod Liver Oil

supplements.name: High-EPA Omega-3 +2g
supplements.notes: Incremental over CLO. VITAL/REDUCE-IT.

supplements.name: Prebiotics combo
supplements.notes: Gut health markers.

supplements.name: Vitamin D 2000 IU
supplements.notes: VITAL NS. Bolland meta D3 HR 0.97.

supplements.name: Astaxanthin 12mg
supplements.notes: CRP/HDL RCTs. Bundled.

supplements.name: Garlic 1200mg
supplements.notes: Obs HR 0.88. BP + calcification RCTs.

supplements.name: Lutein+Zeaxanthin
supplements.notes: AREDS2. Eye health. Bundled.

supplements.name: NAC 1200mg
supplements.notes: Best-supported as a mucolytic in chronic bronchitis/COPD. Much weaker for upper-airway sleep problems, so any sleep benefit is scaled to mucus-heavy phenotypes.

supplements.name: Low-dose lithium 5mg
supplements.notes: Ecological: municipal Li → lower suicide/dementia. No RCTs at low dose.

supplements.name: Vitamin K2 MK-7+MK-4
supplements.notes: Rotterdam obs. Calcification RCTs.

supplements.name: Statin (rosuvastatin 5mg)
supplements.notes: CTT meta: 21% CVD reduction per mmol/L LDL. LDL already 64.

supplements.name: Curcumin 250mg
supplements.notes: Anti-inflam. Bioavailability issues.

supplements.name: HIIT 2x/week
supplements.notes: Structured interval training twice weekly, assumed to replace easier cardio. Modeled as a somewhat larger CRF stimulus with diminishing marginal return.

supplements.name: Ubiquinol 50mg
supplements.notes: Q-SYMBIO RCT in HF. Healthy-pop extrapolation.

supplements.name: HIIT 3x/week
supplements.notes: Three structured interval sessions weekly, assumed to replace easier cardio. Modeled with extra recovery uncertainty and a small recurring downside because current frequency evidence suggests no clear added benefit over 2x/week in recreational runners.

supplements.name: Zinc carnosine 75mg
supplements.notes: Gut barrier integrity. Already getting zinc 15mg.

supplements.name: Tempo run 1x/week
supplements.notes: One threshold/tempo-style run weekly, assumed to replace easier cardio. Modeled as intermediate between easy cardio and HIIT for CRF benefit.

supplements.name: Lions Mane 1g
supplements.notes: NGF stimulation. Small RCTs: cognitive improvement.

supplements.name: Ubiquinol 50mg (unbundled)
supplements.notes: Standalone ubiquinol using current Life Extension pricing, modeled at an Amazon-favored effective cost after 5% Prime cash back.

supplements.name: HIIT 1x/week
supplements.notes: Structured interval training once weekly, assumed to replace an easier cardio session rather than add volume. Modeled through modest CRF/VO2max utility, not a direct mortality claim.

supplements.name: EGCG 400mg (green tea)
supplements.notes: Obs meta HR 0.74-0.85. Heavily confounded. Liver risk at high dose.

supplements.name: NR 300mg
supplements.notes: NAD+ precursor. Bundled.

supplements.name: Quercetin 500mg
supplements.notes: Senolytic. Anti-inflammatory. Animal lifespan.

supplements.name: Ashwagandha 600mg
supplements.notes: RCTs: cortisol, anxiety, sleep, testosterone. Rare liver concern.

supplements.name: Luteolin 100mg
supplements.notes: Anti-inflammatory. Neuroprotective. Bundled.

supplements.name: Zone 2 cardio 2x/week
supplements.notes: Two structured low-to-moderate intensity cardio sessions weekly, assumed to replace unstructured easier running. Modeled as a small CRF and recovery-positive intervention.

supplements.name: Vitamin C 500mg (extra)
supplements.notes: Already getting 250mg from Longevity Mix. Obs meta: modest CVD.

supplements.name: Lithium 1mg orotate
supplements.notes: Ecological Li data. Neuroprotective. Bundled.

supplements.name: Melatonin 300mcg
supplements.notes: Sleep onset RCTs.

supplements.name: Collagen 22g
supplements.notes: No mortality data. Joint/skin RCTs.
supplements.dose_notes: 1 scoop (22.3g) blended into nutty pudding premix

supplements.name: Black seed oil 1g
supplements.notes: Thymoquinone. Anti-inflammatory. No mortality RCTs.

supplements.name: Hyaluronic acid (oral)
supplements.notes: Already 120mg in Longevity Mix. Joint/skin. No mortality.

supplements.name: Luteolin 100mg (unbundled)
supplements.notes: Standalone luteolin using current Double Wood pricing, modeled at an Amazon-favored effective cost after 5% Prime cash back.

supplements.name: Strength maintenance
supplements.notes: Structured maintenance lifting. Kept near flat because you already do strength work daily.

supplements.name: Broccoli Seed Ext 200mg
supplements.notes: Sulforaphane. Phase 2 enzyme induction. Bundled.

supplements.name: Head elevation nightly
supplements.notes: Behavioral airway aid. Most plausible in positional or upper-airway-predominant sleep-disordered breathing.

supplements.name: Taurine 500mg top-up
supplements.notes: Tiny marginal top-up over 1500mg already in Longevity Mix. Most human signals are at 1-3g+ or in non-lean phenotypes.

supplements.name: Glycine 2g bedtime
supplements.notes: Sleep/QOL helper only. Human evidence supports modest next-day fatigue and sleep-quality improvement, not a mortality claim.

supplements.name: Lycopene 15mg
supplements.notes: Song meta obs. Bundled.

supplements.name: Apigenin 50mg
supplements.notes: CD38 inhibitor. Anxiolytic.

supplements.name: Ginger 400mg
supplements.notes: Bundled. Anti-nausea.

supplements.name: TMG/Betaine 1g
supplements.notes: Methyl donor. Homocysteine reduction. Often paired with NR/NMN.

supplements.name: Alpha-lipoic acid 300mg
supplements.notes: Antioxidant. RCTs for diabetic neuropathy.

supplements.name: Spermidine 10mg
supplements.notes: Madeo obs HR 0.70. Animal.

supplements.name: GHK-Cu peptide (topical)
supplements.notes: Wound healing, collagen. Skin only.

supplements.name: Cistanche 200mg
supplements.notes: Testosterone, anti-aging TCM. Very limited human data.

supplements.name: PQQ 20mg
supplements.notes: Mitochondrial biogenesis. Small RCTs. Expensive.

supplements.name: Ergothioneine 5mg
supplements.notes: Longevity vitamin hypothesis. Obs: low ergo → higher mortality.

supplements.name: Fisetin 100mg
supplements.notes: Senolytic. Animal. Bundled.

supplements.name: Boron 3mg
supplements.notes: Prostate/bone obs. Bundled.

supplements.name: Humidifier nightly
supplements.notes: Modeled as a small dryness / nasal-comfort intervention, not a meaningful standalone OSA treatment. Best case is low ambient humidity or waking with dry irritated nasal passages.

supplements.name: Nasacort nightly
supplements.notes: Best-supported for congestion-mediated sleep disturbance and as an adjunct in nasal-obstruction OSA phenotypes. Main benefit is upper-airway, not general prevention.

supplements.name: Doxepin 3mg
supplements.notes: Low-dose doxepin is guideline-supported for sleep-maintenance insomnia. Respiratory caution exists in severe sleep apnea, but it is not clearly contraindicated in mild OSA.

supplements.name: Pterostilbene 50mg
supplements.notes: Resveratrol analog. AMPK/SIRT1. Animal only.

supplements.name: Fisetin 100mg (unbundled)
supplements.notes: Standalone fisetin using current Double Wood pricing, modeled at an Amazon-favored effective cost after 5% Prime cash back.

supplements.name: Sulforaphane 20mg (extra)
supplements.notes: NRF2 activator. Incremental over Broccoli Seed Ext.

supplements.name: Daily probiotics
supplements.notes: Modeled as a low-evidence GI-support intervention, not a hard-endpoint longevity lever. Annual cost uses Sports Research Probiotic 60 Billion at the current official subscribe-and-save price; the currently owned expiring bottle has near-zero marginal cost.
supplements.dose_notes: 1 capsule daily with food while finishing expiring bottle

supplements.name: Nasal strips nightly
supplements.notes: Primarily a subjective nasal-congestion and snoring aid. Helps when the problem is upper-airway narrowing, but usually not a large standalone OSA treatment.

supplements.name: NMN 500mg
supplements.notes: NAD+ precursor (alt to NR). Already getting NR 300mg. Expensive.

supplements.name: NR 300mg (unbundled)
supplements.notes: Standalone NR option using current official Tru Niagen 300mg 180-count subscription pricing.

supplements.name: Mouth tape nightly
supplements.notes: Modeled as a phenotype-specific mouth-breathing intervention, not a generic OSA fix. The evidence suggests some benefit in mild OSA or snoring when habitual open-mouth breathing is part of the problem, but the literature is still thin.

supplements.name: Low-dose aspirin 81mg
supplements.notes: ASPREE (>70yr): no benefit, more bleeding. USPSTF equivocal at 39.

supplements.name: Urolithin A 500mg
supplements.notes: Mitopure. RCTs: improved mitochondrial function. Expensive.

supplements.name: APAP nightly
supplements.notes: Modeled as the strongest pre-diagnosis airway intervention candidate. No direct mortality term; benefit comes through sleep-burden and sleep-mortality relief.

supplements.name: Trazodone 50mg
supplements.notes: Sleep maintenance. No mortality data.

supplements.name: Custom oral appliance
supplements.notes: Custom mandibular advancement device, annualized over replacement and follow-up. Typically less effective than PAP but often easier to tolerate.

supplements.name: 17α-estradiol (topical)
supplements.notes: ITP mice: +19% median lifespan (males only). No human data.

supplements.name: Berberine 500mg
supplements.notes: Metformin-like. RCTs in diabetes. GI side effects.

supplements.name: Rapamycin 5mg/wk
supplements.notes: ITP mice: +26% median lifespan. Mannick 2014. Immunosuppression risk.

supplements.name: Acarbose 50mg
supplements.notes: ITP mice: +22% median lifespan (males). GI side effects.

supplements.name: BPC-157 cycle
supplements.notes: Modeled for a generic annual cycle in an otherwise uninjured user. Human efficacy evidence is extremely thin and product-quality uncertainty is real.

supplements.name: SGLT2i (empagliflozin)
supplements.notes: EMPA-REG: HR 0.68 CV death (diabetics). Off-label in healthy unclear.

supplements.name: TB-500 cycle
supplements.notes: Treated as an even weaker evidence base than BPC-157 for a general healthy user.

supplements.name: HBOT 60-session course
supplements.notes: Cost annualized from a clinic course. Healthy-aging evidence remains early and mostly surrogate-driven.

supplements.name: Traditional dry sauna 4x/week
supplements.notes: Modeled as a modest Finnish-style dry sauna intervention, not a direct mortality claim. Effect assumes roughly 175-194F traditional dry sauna; cost uses current MINT DC club pricing as a local paid-access proxy.

supplements.name: Infrared sauna 4x/week
supplements.notes: Infrared sauna is modeled separately from Finnish dry sauna because the evidence is weaker and less directly transportable. Cost uses current Pure Sweat Georgetown unlimited pricing for 4x/week access.

supplements.name: Lemborexant 5mg
supplements.notes: Dual orexin receptor antagonist with direct respiratory-safety data in mild through severe OSA. Modeled as slightly more efficacious than daridorexant for maintenance insomnia, but with a bit more next-day drag.

supplements.name: Suvorexant 10mg
supplements.notes: Dual orexin receptor antagonist with clear insomnia efficacy, but the label keeps more respiratory caution in OSA than daridorexant or lemborexant. Modeled as a middling trazodone alternative for mild OSA.

supplements.name: GLP-1 RA (semaglutide)
supplements.notes: SELECT trial: HR 0.80 MACE in overweight/obesity with established CVD. Strong transport shrinkage applied for lean, low-risk profiles plus GI/gallbladder harms.

supplements.name: Daridorexant 25mg
supplements.notes: Dual orexin receptor antagonist with direct mild-to-moderate OSA respiratory-safety data. Modeled as a cleaner maintenance-insomnia option than trazodone, but very expensive.

meal_1.name: Blueprint Cocoa
meal_1.dose_notes: 1 scoop (5.76g) blended into nutty pudding premix

meal_1.name: Blueprint Collagen Peptides
meal_1.dose_notes: 1 scoop (22.3g) blended into nutty pudding premix

Sports Research Daily Probiotics
meal_1.dose_notes: 1 capsule daily with food while finishing expiring bottle

meal_2.name: Nordic Naturals Arctic Cod Liver Oil
